title: Collective alignment: public input on our Model Spec
summary: Surveyed over 1,000 people worldwide on how AI should behave and compared their views against OpenAI's Model Spec, using the results to inform default model behavior so it better reflects diverse human values.

title: Accelerating life sciences research
summary: OpenAI and Retro Biosciences used a specialized model, GPT-4b micro, to redesign reprogramming proteins, producing engineered variants with substantially improved efficiency for stem-cell therapy and longevity research.

title: Claude Opus 4 and 4.1 can now end a rare subset of conversations

title: GPT-5 System Card

title: Pioneering an AI clinical copilot with Penda Health

title: ChatGPT agent System Card

title: Project Vend: Can Claude run a small shop? (And why does that matter?)

title: Confidential Inference via Trusted Virtual Machines

title: SHADE-Arena: Evaluating sabotage and monitoring in LLM agents

title: Addendum to OpenAI o3 and o4-mini system card: OpenAI o3 Operator
summary: System card addendum announcing that OpenAI's Operator computer-use agent migrates from a GPT-4o-based model to one based on o3 (the API version remains on 4o), accompanied by updated safety evaluations.

title: Values in the wild: Discovering and analyzing values in real-world language model interactions
summary: Analyzes 700,000 real-world Claude conversations to build the first large-scale empirical taxonomy of values an AI expresses in practice, examining how expressed values shift across contexts.

title: OpenAI o3 and o4-mini System Card

title: Our updated Preparedness Framework

title: BrowseComp: a benchmark for browsing agents

title: Anthropic Education Report: How university students use Claude

title: Tracing the thoughts of a large language model

title: Anthropic Economic Index: Insights from Claude 3.7 Sonnet

title: OpenAI GPT-4.5 System Card
summary: System card for GPT-4.5, a research preview scaling unsupervised pretraining rather than chain-of-thought reasoning, trained with new supervision techniques plus SFT and RLHF. Safety testing shows reduced hallucinations

title: Deep research System Card
summary: OpenAI's system card documenting pre-release safety work for the Deep Research agent, including external red teaming, Preparedness Framework frontier-risk evaluations, and the mitigations built to address key risk areas.

title: Forecasting rare language model behaviors

title: OpenAI o3-mini System Card
summary: System card for OpenAI o3-mini documenting safety work including safety evaluations, external red teaming, and Preparedness Framework assessments for the reasoning model prior to deployment.

title: OpenAI o3-mini

title: Clio: A system for privacy-preserving insights into real-world AI use
summary: System that uses Claude to anonymize, cluster, and summarize millions of real conversations, yielding privacy-preserving insights into how people actually use AI — coding, writing, and research dominate — without humans
